steps.name: the user is on the CaseKaro homepage

elements.name: Search for Apple brand and add iPhone 16 Pro case in all 3 materials to cart

steps.name: the user clicks on "Mobile Covers" menu
the user clicks the search button and types "Apple"
only Apple brand results should be visible
no other brand results should be visible
the user searches for model "Iphone 16 pro"
the user clicks "Choose options" for the first item

steps.name: the user adds the "Hard" material case to cart
the user goes back to product options
the user adds the "Soft" material case to cart
the user goes back to product options
the user adds the "Glass" material case to cart
the cart should contain 3 items with different materials
the cart should have items with materials "Hard", "Soft", and "Glass"
the price details for all items should be printed in console
